CaLMR 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • CaLMR Tutorial: Test the Effect of Chronic Inflammation on Rheumatoid Arthritis

CaLMR (Uni) Pipeline

run_calmr_uni.Rd

Performs IV selection, LD clumping, and runs CaLMR(Uni). Called by run_calmr. Can also be applied directly with pre-loaded data.

Usage

run_calmr_uni(
  all_biomarkers,
  outcome_df,
  outcome_name,
  traitvec,
  sign,
  Corr.mat,
  pval_threshold,
  reference_dir,
  plink_path,
  r2,
  kb,
  pvalthr_clump,
  confounder,
  T_iter,
  burnin,
  min_snps,
  save_clump_file
)

Arguments

all_biomarkers

A named list of K data frames, one per biomarker.

outcome_df

Data frame of outcome GWAS summary statistics.

outcome_name

Character string for the outcome label.

traitvec

Character vector of length K.

sign

Numeric vector of length K (1, -1, or 0).

Corr.mat

Correlation matrix (K x K or (K+1) x (K+1)).

pval_threshold

Named numeric vector of p-value thresholds.

reference_dir

Path to PLINK reference files.

plink_path

Path to PLINK.

r2

LD clumping r-squared threshold.

kb

LD clumping window in kilobases.

pvalthr_clump

P-value threshold for LD clumping.

confounder

Optional character vector of SNP IDs to exclude.

T_iter

Total Gibbs sampler iterations.

burnin

Burn-in iterations.

min_snps

Minimum total SNPs after preprocessing.

save_clump_file

Logical; keep clumping summary file

Value

A list with calmr_result, CI, mcmc.detail, and calmr_info. Returns NULL if too few SNPs.
